hero.title: Labs Cannabis
hero.subtitle: Licensed Medical Cannabis Dispensary in South Pattaya
hero.tagline: Premium flower. Expert consultations. Soi Hollywood.

about.p1: Labs Cannabis is a licensed medical cannabis dispensary located on Soi Hollywood (Pattaya 13), one of the most well-known streets in the heart of South Pattaya. We operate fully within the Thai medical cannabis framework, offering a safe, legal, and welcoming environment for both first-time visitors and experienced cannabis users.
about.p2: Our dispensary features an on-site licensed practitioner of Thai traditional medicine who provides free consultations to every customer. Whether you're a tourist exploring Pattaya or a long-term resident, our knowledgeable staff will guide you through our curated selection of premium-quality flower to find what suits your needs.
about.p3: We believe in a clean, professional approach to cannabis — no hype, no gimmicks. Just carefully sourced, lab-tested product served in a comfortable, boutique atmosphere. Every strain in our collection is selected for quality, potency, and flavor profile.
about.p4: Walk in, talk to our practitioner, and discover why Labs Cannabis is the dispensary Pattaya trusts. We're open daily and conveniently located just a 5-minute walk from Walking Street.

howItWorks.intro: New to cannabis in Thailand? Here's what to expect when you visit our dispensary:
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find us on Soi Hollywood (Pattaya 13 Alley) in South Pattaya — a 5-minute walk from Walking Street. Walk-ins are welcome, no appointment needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Meet our licensed Thai traditional medicine practitioner for a complimentary consultation. They will assess your needs and answer any questions.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive your personalized medical recommendation from our licensed practitioner — this is required under Thai law and included at no extra cost.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Browse our curated selection of premium cannabis flower. Our staff will help you pick the strain that's right for you based on your consultation.

location.address: 32 Pattaya 13 Alley (Soi Hollywood), South Pattaya, Pattaya City, Chon Buri 20150
location.landmark: Soi Hollywood, South Pattaya — 5 min walk from Walking Street

contact.intro: Walk-ins are always welcome! Have a question before your visit? Reach out through any of our channels:

footer.disclaimer: Cannabis products are available only to individuals aged 20 and above with a valid medical recommendation from a licensed practitioner. Labs Cannabis operates under the Thai medical cannabis framework as a controlled herb dispensary. This is not a recreational facility. Please consume responsibly.
